name: Tavily Search
description: Web search via Tavily API — AI-optimized search with structured results.

apiKey.label: Tavily API Key
apiKey.help: Your Tavily API key (tvly-...). Falls back to TAVILY_API_KEY env var.

searchDepth.label: Search Depth
searchDepth.help: basic (fast, 1 credit), advanced (detailed, 2 credits), fast, ultra-fast.

includeAnswer.label: Include AI Answer
includeAnswer.help: Include a Tavily LLM-synthesized answer in results.

maxResults.label: Max Results
maxResults.help: Default number of results to return (1-20).
